First Responders get top priority on America’s best network

Best Mobile Network in the U.S. according to Ookla® Speedtest®  

Delivering reliable communications with the nation’s first 5G standalone network

Why T-Priority?

T-Priority keeps more first responders connected—even in times of congestion

More
5G capacity

Our 5G network has more capacity than any other. With the T-Priority network slice, the capacity dedicated to first responders can dynamically expand during rare times of extreme congestion.

 

Fastest
5G network in America

Maintain critical communications on the network with more speed than AT&T and Verizon.

 

Based on median, national download speeds.

 

 

Best
5G coverage

T-Mobile has the nation’s largest 5G network covering 98% of Americans, and covering the most highway miles in America.

 

Extending communication beyond traditional networks

Explore how T-Satellite helps public safety agencies maintain critical communications, location awareness, and essential data exchange when coverage is unavailable or disrupted.

Read the article

Las Vegas Metro PD—connected when it counts.

When thousands descend on Las Vegas for the Formula 1 Grand Prix, Las Vegas Metro can't afford a communications breakdown. Hear from a LVMPD commander how T-Priority prioritizes first responders and keeps them connected—even during peak network congestion.

Empowering first responders at Las Vegas Grand Prix with T-Priority.

Ready to experience T-Priority?

We’ll put you in touch with an expert about getting T-Priority for your organization.

Products and solutions

T-Priority works with network management systems like priority access and preemption to ensure vital comms during network congestion.

Choose the plan that fits your business
Features

5G connectivity in action

Transforming first responder operations with T-Priority: insights from experts

Explore firsthand perspectives from a fire chief, a telecom analyst, and the CTO of T-Mobile on how America’s first 5G network slice built for public safety is reshaping emergency communications.

Read more , opens in a new window

Got questions?

  • T-Priority is T-Mobile’s dedicated network service for first responders, delivering always-on priority and preemption across our nationwide 5G network — including extensive rural coverage. T-Priority supports a wide range of compatible 5G devices, so agencies don’t need to invest in proprietary hardware to stay connected. Explore the full list of T-Priority-compatible smartphones, tablets, routers, and rugged devices on our T-Priority device compatibility page.

  • T-Priority requires a compatible device that supports all three 5G standalone (SA) bands used on T-Mobile’s network to deliver full priority service. There are over 100 certified T-Priority-ready devices, including smartphones, tablets, rugged laptops, and routers. This ensures first responders can access priority connectivity with the equipment that fits their mission needs.

  • T-Priority’s advanced features operate on T-Mobile’s industry-leading 5G standalone network, which provides the industry’s broadest nationwide coverage and strong performance in both urban and rural areas — particularly on our low-band n71 spectrum. While other networks rely more heavily on localized 5G standalone or LTE-based coverage, T-Priority gives first responders a platform to stay connected with the latest 5G technology across a wider range of environments. All T-Priority customers enjoy priority access and preemption features across T-Mobile’s full combined 4G LTE and 5G network.

  • Yes. T-Priority is available to verified public safety agencies and personnel, including EMS, law enforcement, firefighters, healthcare providers, and emergency management teams.

  • If you are looking for more information about our basic Connecting Heroes service please contact us.

Share this page
